item.title: 432Hz Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: 432Hz Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: hanuman
item.itunes:summary:
432Hz Player
(Audioplayers)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm with low CPU usage. It also auto-detects the music exact pitch for precise tuning.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/432hz-Player

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]
item.description:
432Hz Player
(Audioplayers)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm with low CPU usage. It also auto-detects the music exact pitch for precise tuning.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/432hz-Player

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
432Hz Player
(Audioplayers)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm with low CPU usage. It also auto-detects the music exact pitch for precise tuning.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/432hz-Player

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]

item.title: 432Hz Batch Converter [Audio Extractors/Converters]
item.itunes:title: 432Hz Batch Converter [Audio Extractors/Converters]
item.itunes:author: hanuman
item.itunes:summary:
432Hz Batch Converter
(Audio Extractors/Converters)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application re-encodes your audio files while shifting the pitch to 432hz. It uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/432hz-Batch-Converter

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]
item.description:
432Hz Batch Converter
(Audio Extractors/Converters)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application re-encodes your audio files while shifting the pitch to 432hz. It uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/432hz-Batch-Converter

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
432Hz Batch Converter
(Audio Extractors/Converters)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application re-encodes your audio files while shifting the pitch to 432hz. It uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/432hz-Batch-Converter

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]

item.title: Powerliminals Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Powerliminals Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: hanuman
item.itunes:summary:
Powerliminals Player
(Audioplayers)
Plays Powerliminal audios, which are nearly-silent audios containing very high-frequency energies to play in the background. You can stack 10 to 30 audios at varying speeds to play in the background day and night, selecting the balance of energies that you need.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/powerliminals-nonrivalry

Here's a free Powerliminal on YouTube. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jdcWwWM6hQg

I can play 25 audios with ~3% CPU usage.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later) and Linux (all distros).

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/Powerliminals-Player

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com
[read more]
item.description:
Powerliminals Player
(Audioplayers)
Plays Powerliminal audios, which are nearly-silent audios containing very high-frequency energies to play in the background. You can stack 10 to 30 audios at varying speeds to play in the background day and night, selecting the balance of energies that you need.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/powerliminals-nonrivalry

Here's a free Powerliminal on YouTube. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jdcWwWM6hQg

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Powerliminals Player
(Audioplayers)
Plays Powerliminal audios, which are nearly-silent audios containing very high-frequency energies to play in the background. You can stack 10 to 30 audios at varying speeds to play in the background day and night, selecting the balance of energies that you need.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/powerliminals-nonrivalry

Here's a free Powerliminal on YouTube. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jdcWwWM6hQg

I can play 25 audios with ~3% CPU usage.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later) and Linux (all distros).

Installation instructions

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.

item.title: Yang YouTube Downloader [Video Converters]
item.itunes:title: Yang YouTube Downloader [Video Converters]
item.itunes:author: hanuman
item.itunes:summary:
Yang YouTube Downloader
(Video Converters)
Yet another YouTube downloader? Most downloaders do not give the best quality as they choose the wrong streams and re-encode them.
This downloader allows you to get either the MP4 or VP9 videos, and the AAC or Opus audios, without re-encoding to preserve the best quality. While VP9 is 35% more efficient than MP4 for videos, some videos have 40-60% smaller file sizes in VP9 format! It will automatically select the best-quality video based on file sizes. It can even combine MP4 videos with Opus audios in a MKV file, although not all players will support it. I haven't seen any other downloader that can produce a MKV file with the best video and audio without re-encoding anything.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/Yang-YouTube-Downloader

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]
item.description:
Yang YouTube Downloader
(Video Converters)
Yet another YouTube downloader? Most downloaders do not give the best quality as they choose the wrong streams and re-encode them.
This downloader allows you to get either the MP4 or VP9 videos, and the AAC or Opus audios, without re-encoding to preserve the best quality. While VP9 is 35% more efficient than MP4 for videos, some videos have 40-60% smaller file sizes in VP9 format! It will automatically select the best-quality video based on file sizes. It can even combine MP4 videos with Opus audios in a MKV file, although not all players will support it. I haven't seen any other downloader that can produce a MKV file with the best video and audio without re-encoding anything.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/Yang-YouTube-Downloader

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Yang YouTube Downloader
(Video Converters)
Yet another YouTube downloader? Most downloaders do not give the best quality as they choose the wrong streams and re-encode them.
This downloader allows you to get either the MP4 or VP9 videos, and the AAC or Opus audios, without re-encoding to preserve the best quality. While VP9 is 35% more efficient than MP4 for videos, some videos have 40-60% smaller file sizes in VP9 format! It will automatically select the best-quality video based on file sizes. It can even combine MP4 videos with Opus audios in a MKV file, although not all players will support it. I haven't seen any other downloader that can produce a MKV file with the best video and audio without re-encoding anything.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions

item.title: Wiki Editor [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: Wiki Editor [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: hitokiri-2
item.itunes:summary:
Wiki Editor
(IDEs)
PyGtk4 application designed to create, change, and enrich wiki contents.
A simple text-editor using GtkSource 5 to do simple actions such as find/replace text contents.

Wiki-Editor can be modified by editing local file araclar.py.
See wiki-page for further explanations.

https://www.opencode.net/hitokiri-2/wiki-editor-3-0/-/wikis/home

[read more]
item.description:
Wiki Editor
(IDEs)
PyGtk4 application designed to create, change, and enrich wiki contents.
A simple text-editor using GtkSource 5 to do simple actions such as find/replace text contents.

Wiki-Editor can be modified by editing local file araclar.py.
See wiki-page for further explanations.

https://www.opencode.net/hitokiri-2/wiki-editor-3-0/-/wikis/home

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Wiki Editor
(IDEs)
PyGtk4 application designed to create, change, and enrich wiki contents.
A simple text-editor using GtkSource 5 to do simple actions such as find/replace text contents.

Wiki-Editor can be modified by editing local file araclar.py.
See wiki-page for further explanations.

https://www.opencode.net/hitokiri-2/wiki-editor-3-0/-/wikis/home

[read more]

item.title: GS GMS DOZE UNIVERSAL [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: GS GMS DOZE UNIVERSAL [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GS GMS DOZE UNIVERSAL
(Virtualization)
Here I'll Upload some necessary modules and apps.
[h2]Linux Installation[/h2]

Unzip the ZIP File:
unzip
Navigate to the Extracted Folder:

cd extracted_folder
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
./
For 64-bit systems:
./

[h2]Windows Installation[/h2]
Extract the zip:
Use a tool like WinRAR, 7-Zip, or the built-in Windows tool to extract the contents of the APK file.
Open Command Prompt:

Press Win + R, type cmd, and press Enter.
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
bash
For 64-bit systems:
bash

[h2]Android Installation / BlissOS / Other Emulator Installation[/h2]
Open Magisk / Kernel SU:

Ensure you have Magisk or Kernel SU installed on your device or emulator.
Go to the Module Section:

Open the Magisk app and navigate to the Modules section.
Select the Module from Storage:

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.
Install the Module:

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.
Reboot the Device:

Once the installation is complete, reboot your device to finalize the installation.
[h2]Virtualisation Installation[/h2]
Step 1: Open LDPlayer,android studio or other simulation
Ensure LDPlayer, an Android emulator, is installed on your computer. Open LDPlayer to begin the process.

Step 2: Follow Android Installation
Within LDPlayer, follow the steps outlined in the Android Installation section:

Open Magisk or KernelSU within the emulator.
Navigate to the Modules section.
Select the module from storage.
Install the module.
Reboot the virtual device within LDPlayer.
[read more]

(Virtualization)
Here I'll Upload some necessary modules and apps.

Press Win + R, type cmd, and press Enter.

For 32-bit systems:
bash
For 64-bit systems:
bash

[h2]Android Installation / BlissOS / Other Emulator Installation[/h2]
Open Magisk / Kernel SU:

Ensure you have Magisk or Kernel SU installed on your device or emulator.
Go to the Module Section:

Open the Magisk app and navigate to the Modules section.
Select the Module from Storage:

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.
Install the Module:

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.
Reboot the Device:

Once the installation is complete, reboot your device to finalize the installation.
[h2]Virtualisation Installation[/h2]
Step 1: Open LDPlayer,android studio or other simulation
Ensure LDPlayer, an Android emulator, is installed on your computer. Open LDPlayer to begin the process.

Step 2: Follow Android Installation
Within LDPlayer, follow the steps outlined in the Android Installation section:

Open Magisk or KernelSU within the emulator.
Navigate to the Modules section.
Select the module from storage.
Install the module.
Reboot the virtual device within LDPlayer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GS GMS DOZE UNIVERSAL
(Virtualization)
Here I'll Upload some necessary modules and apps.
[h2]Linux Installation[/h2]

Unzip the ZIP File:
unzip
Navigate to the Extracted Folder:

cd extracted_folder
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
./
For 64-bit systems:
./

[h2]Windows Installation[/h2]
Extract the zip:
Use a tool like WinRAR, 7-Zip, or the built-in Windows tool to extract the contents of the APK file.
Open Command Prompt:

Press Win + R, type cmd, and press Enter.
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
bash
For 64-bit systems:
bash

[h2]Android Installation / BlissOS / Other Emulator Installation[/h2]
Open Magisk / Kernel SU:

Ensure you have Magisk or Kernel SU installed on your device or emulator.
Go to the Module Section:

Open the Magisk app and navigate to the Modules section.
Select the Module from Storage:

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.
Install the Module:

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.
Reboot the Device:

Once the installation is complete, reboot your device to finalize the installation.
[h2]Virtualisation Installation[/h2]
Step 1: Open LDPlayer,android studio or other simulation
Ensure LDPlayer, an Android emulator, is installed on your computer. Open LDPlayer to begin the process.

Step 2: Follow Android Installation
Within LDPlayer, follow the steps outlined in the Android Installation section:

Open Magisk or KernelSU within the emulator.
Navigate to the Modules section.
Select the module from storage.
Install the module.
Reboot the virtual device within LDPlayer.
[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: Game Script [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:title: Game Script [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:author: procedural
item.itunes:summary:
Game Script
(Developers Apps)
Game Script is about raising the standards of what it's like to write code fast: you must be able to just double click on the program and start typing code immediately, you must be able to run the code with a single key press, and you must be able to enter the game mode, in which you can fly around in 3D space freely, like in a video game, to see your commands reliably occupy the virtual world.

[read more]
item.description:
Game Script
(Developers Apps)
Game Script is about raising the standards of what it's like to write code fast: you must be able to just double click on the program and start typing code immediately, you must be able to run the code with a single key press, and you must be able to enter the game mode, in which you can fly around in 3D space freely, like in a video game, to see your commands reliably occupy the virtual world.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Game Script
(Developers Apps)
Game Script is about raising the standards of what it's like to write code fast: you must be able to just double click on the program and start typing code immediately, you must be able to run the code with a single key press, and you must be able to enter the game mode, in which you can fly around in 3D space freely, like in a video game, to see your commands reliably occupy the virtual world.

[read more]

item.title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:author: wusel1007
item.itunes:summary:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

Use: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper install ClamAV-GUI

For Ubuntu (UALinux repository): https://ualinux.com/en/ubuntu-apps-other/clamav-gui
How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect
[read more]

(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome
